mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rpt_finance_monthly ( stat_month, project_id, fee_item_id, fee_item_type, receivable_amount, received_amount, outstanding_amount, deduction_amount, adjustment_amount, overdue_amount, overdue_rate, deposit_balance, prepay_balance, collection_rate, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{r.statMonth}, #{r.projectId}, COALESCE(#{r.feeItemId}, 0), #{r.feeItemType}, COALESCE(#{r.receivableAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.receivedAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.outstandingAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.deductionAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.adjustmentAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.overdueAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.overdueRate}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.depositBalance}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.prepayBalance}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.collectionRate}, 0), 0, NOW(), 0, NOW(), 0 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE fee_item_type = VALUES(fee_item_type), receivable_amount = VALUES(receivable_amount), received_amount = VALUES(received_amount), outstanding_amount = VALUES(outstanding_amount), deduction_amount = VALUES(deduction_amount), adjustment_amount = VALUES(adjustment_amount), overdue_amount = VALUES(overdue_amount), overdue_rate = VALUES(overdue_rate), deposit_balance = VALUES(deposit_balance), prepay_balance = VALUES(prepay_balance), collection_rate = VALUES(collection_rate), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(stat_month) FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND fee_item_id = 0

SELECT * FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND fee_item_id = 0 AND stat_month = #{statMonth}
ORDER BY project_id

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, SUM(receivable_amount) AS receivableAmount, SUM(received_amount) AS receivedAmount, SUM(outstanding_amount) AS outstandingAmount, SUM(overdue_amount) AS overdueAmount, SUM(deduction_amount) AS deductionAmount, SUM(adjustment_amount) AS adjustmentAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(receivable_amount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(received_amount) / SUM(receivable_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS collectionRate, CASE WHEN SUM(receivable_amount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(overdue_amount) / SUM(receivable_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS overdueRate, SUM(deposit_balance) AS depositBalance, SUM(prepay_balance) AS prepayBalance FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND fee_item_id = 0
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id ORDER BY stat_month, project_id

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, fee_item_type AS feeItemType, SUM(receivable_amount) AS receivableAmount, SUM(received_amount) AS receivedAmount, SUM(outstanding_amount) AS outstandingAmount, SUM(deduction_amount) AS deductionAmount, SUM(adjustment_amount) AS adjustmentAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(receivable_amount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(received_amount) / SUM(receivable_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS collectionRate FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND fee_item_type = #{feeItemType}
AND fee_item_id = 0
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id, fee_item_type ORDER BY stat_month, project_id

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, fee_item_type AS feeItemType, SUM(receivable_amount) AS receivableAmount, SUM(received_amount) AS receivedAmount, SUM(outstanding_amount) AS outstandingAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(receivable_amount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(received_amount) / SUM(receivable_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS collectionRate FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND fee_item_type = #{feeItemType}
AND fee_item_id = 0
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id, fee_item_type ORDER BY stat_month, project_id

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, fee_item_type AS feeItemType, SUM(receivable_amount) AS receivableAmount, SUM(received_amount) AS receivedAmount, SUM(outstanding_amount) AS outstandingAmount, SUM(overdue_amount) AS overdueAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(receivable_amount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(overdue_amount) / SUM(receivable_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS overdueRate, SUM(deduction_amount) AS deductionAmount, SUM(adjustment_amount) AS adjustmentAmount FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND fee_item_type = #{feeItemType}
AND fee_item_id = 0
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id, fee_item_type ORDER BY stat_month, project_id

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, SUM(receivable_amount) AS receivableAmount, SUM(overdue_amount) AS overdueAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(receivable_amount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(overdue_amount) / SUM(receivable_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS overdueRate FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND fee_item_id = 0
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id ORDER BY stat_month, project_id

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, fee_item_type AS feeItemType, SUM(receivable_amount) AS receivableAmount, SUM(received_amount) AS receivedAmount, SUM(outstanding_amount) AS outstandingAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(receivable_amount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(received_amount) / SUM(receivable_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS collectionRate FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND fee_item_type = #{feeItemType}
AND fee_item_id = 0
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id, fee_item_type ORDER BY stat_month, project_id

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, SUM(deposit_balance) AS depositBalance FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND fee_item_id = 0
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id ORDER BY stat_month, project_id

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, SUM(prepay_balance) AS prepayBalance FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND fee_item_id = 0
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id ORDER BY stat_month, project_id

SELECT stat_month AS timeDim, project_id AS projectId, fee_item_type AS feeItemType, SUM(receivable_amount) AS receivableAmount, SUM(deduction_amount) AS deductionAmount, SUM(adjustment_amount) AS adjustmentAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(receivable_amount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(deduction_amount) / SUM(receivable_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS deductionRate, CASE WHEN SUM(receivable_amount) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(adjustment_amount) / SUM(receivable_amount) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS adjustmentRate FROM rpt_finance_monthly WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND fee_item_type = #{feeItemType}
AND fee_item_id = 0
GROUP BY stat_month, project_id, fee_item_type ORDER BY stat_month, project_id
